title: Vic's Point Blank
description: High quality gun mod focused on streamlined design and community contributions
body:
![wallpaper](https://i.imgur.com/vdKoaE7.png)
## Created by the original authors of Vic's Modern Warfare, Point Blank is a gun mod with a focus on community contribution and creating a gun mod that more or less fits Minecraft's aesthetic.
### Available for Minecraft Version 1.20.1 and 1.21, Forge. Neoforge, and Fabric


### Point Blank intends to add guns in a way that fits Minecraft's aesthetic without compromising on high quality models and animations.

The mod's main feature is being able to quickly add your own high quality guns to the game with zero coding knowledge or experience.

This is the kind of mod where, if you already have a modeled, textured, and animated gun ready to go, you can add it into the game in as fast as 10 minutes.

Easy to learn, easy to implement.

![content](https://i.imgur.com/1fjbZSU.png)


![content1](https://i.imgur.com/cI6rcHk.png)
![content2](https://i.imgur.com/K3wezC6.png)

### By default, Point Blank comes with ~40 (and counting) weapons. Many of these guns feature fire modes--through which you can switch by pressing 'B'.
All of these guns have high quality reload, inspect, and draw animations.
The guns can be inaccurate. Your weapon's accuracy will be reduced when you're running, and increased when you're aiming.

![how to add your own guns](https://i.imgur.com/ZSKeLsT.png)
